<?php namespace Spatie\Backup\Notifications; use Illuminate\Notifications\Notifiable as NotifiableTrait; use Spatie\Backup\Config\Config; class Notifiable { use NotifiableTrait; /** @return string|array{int, string} */ public function routeNotificationForMail(): string|array { return $this->config()->notifications->mail->to; } public function routeNotificationForSlack(): string { return $this->config()->notifications->slack->webhookUrl; } public function routeNotificationForDiscord(): string { return $this->config()->notifications->discord->webhookUrl; } public function getKey(): int { return 1; } protected function config(): Config { return app(Config::class); } }
